title: corybas expansus
intro: Corybas expansus, also known as the Australian ground orchid or the helmet orchid, is a flowering plant native to Australia and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Corybas expansus include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
